news.title:
Indonesia's BrahMos missile deal may benefit Indian firms like HAL, Data Patterns, Paras Defence, Premier Explosives, and PTC Industries.
HAL leads integration; Data Patterns develops systems; Paras Defence, Premier Explosives, and PTC supply critical components to BrahMos programme.
news.summary:
Indonesia's BrahMos missile deal may benefit Indian firms like HAL, Data Patterns, Paras Defence, Premier Explosives, and PTC Industries.
HAL leads integration; Data Patterns develops systems; Paras Defence, Premier Explosives, and PTC supply critical components to BrahMos programme.

news.title:
An undisclosed buyer acquired a 41.3% stake in Premier Explosives Ltd from Amarnath Gupta and Kailash Gupta.
The transaction was completed on February 18, 2026.
news.summary:
An undisclosed buyer acquired a 41.3% stake in Premier Explosives Ltd from Amarnath Gupta and Kailash Gupta.
The transaction was completed on February 18, 2026.

news.title:
Premier Explosives expects INR 150-200 Cr revenue boost from RDX/HMX expansion in FY '27.
50% of INR 429 Cr Chaffs & Flares order and EBITDA margins of 15-20% projected for FY '27.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives expects INR 150-200 Cr revenue boost from RDX/HMX expansion in FY '27.
50% of INR 429 Cr Chaffs & Flares order and EBITDA margins of 15-20% projected for FY '27.

news.title:
Premier Explosives lowers FY'26 revenue outlook to INR500 crores due to accident, import delays.
FY'27 revenue is estimated at INR500-600 crores, described as conservative.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives lowers FY'26 revenue outlook to INR500 crores due to accident, import delays.
FY'27 revenue is estimated at INR500-600 crores, described as conservative.

news.title:
India's missile boom highlights the crucial role of defence chemicals like propellants and explosives, now mostly produced domestically.
Key players like Solar Industries and Premier Explosives lead in manufacturing missile propellants, explosives, and defence materials, driving long-term growth.
news.summary:
India's missile boom highlights the crucial role of defence chemicals like propellants and explosives, now mostly produced domestically.
Key players like Solar Industries and Premier Explosives lead in manufacturing missile propellants, explosives, and defence materials, driving long-term growth.

news.title:
Premier Explosives Ltd reported Q3FY26 revenue at ₹814 Mn, down 51% YoY, due to high base effect from prior year's Chaffs and Flares dispatches.
Order book stands robust at ₹12,946 Mn (3.1x FY25 revenue). PAT for Q3FY26 declined 34.3% YoY to ₹60.4 Mn.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives Ltd reported Q3FY26 revenue at ₹814 Mn, down 51% YoY, due to high base effect from prior year's Chaffs and Flares dispatches.
Order book stands robust at ₹12,946 Mn (3.1x FY25 revenue). PAT for Q3FY26 declined 34.3% YoY to ₹60.4 Mn.

news.title:
Premier Explosives Ltd posted flat quarterly results with declining net sales and PAT.
The report signals margin pressures and operational challenges in the chemical sector.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives Ltd posted flat quarterly results with declining net sales and PAT.
The report signals margin pressures and operational challenges in the chemical sector.

news.title:
Premier Explosives' Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹116M from ₹154M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.3% from 9.3% YoY.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives' Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹116M from ₹154M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.3% from 9.3% YoY.

news.title:
Premier Explosives Ltd schedules board meeting on Feb 12, 2026 to approve unaudited Q3 and 9-month results.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed from Jan 1 to Feb 14, 2026.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives Ltd schedules board meeting on Feb 12, 2026 to approve unaudited Q3 and 9-month results.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed from Jan 1 to Feb 14, 2026.

news.title:
Premier Explosives Ltd received an international order worth Rs. 17.7 crore for rocket motors.
The order is to be executed within 12 months, with no promoter interest or related party involvement.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives Ltd received an international order worth Rs. 17.7 crore for rocket motors.
The order is to be executed within 12 months, with no promoter interest or related party involvement.

news.title:
Premier Explosives surged 5.7% intraday, hitting Rs 522 peak.
It outperformed the Chemicals sector and Sensex with strong trading activity.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives surged 5.7% intraday, hitting Rs 522 peak.
It outperformed the Chemicals sector and Sensex with strong trading activity.

news.title:
Cello World enters agreement to assign Cello Brand trademark for stationery and writing instruments, zero royalty.
Dr. Reddy’s, Paras Defence among 10 stocks in focus on Nov 25.
news.summary:
Cello World enters agreement to assign Cello Brand trademark for stationery and writing instruments, zero royalty.

news.title:
Premier Explosives Ltd secures export order worth INR 73.1 crore for Defence Products delivery within 12 months.
The order is awarded by an international entity and does not involve related party transactions or promoter interest.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives Ltd secures export order worth INR 73.1 crore for Defence Products delivery within 12 months.
The order is awarded by an international entity and does not involve related party transactions or promoter interest.

news.title:
Six stocks pledged crores in Andhra Pradesh for new initiatives, spanning defence, aerospace, renewables, and more.
Stocks like EPACK, Premier Explosives, Anant Raj, TruAlt, Raymond, and GRSE see gains after MoUs for investments.
news.summary:
Six stocks pledged crores in Andhra Pradesh for new initiatives, spanning defence, aerospace, renewables, and more.
Stocks like EPACK, Premier Explosives, Anant Raj, TruAlt, Raymond, and GRSE see gains after MoUs for investments.

news.title:
Premier Explosives signs ₹500 crore deal with Andhra Pradesh for a defense and aerospace facility.
The investment aims to establish a manufacturing unit for defense and aerospace purposes.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives signs ₹500 crore deal with Andhra Pradesh for a defense and aerospace facility.
The investment aims to establish a manufacturing unit for defense and aerospace purposes.

news.title:
Premier Explosives posted Rs 118.5 Cr operating cash flow and Rs 217.7 Cr net sales.
Despite quarterly net sales decline, it showed resilience, outperforming the Sensex long-term.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives posted Rs 118.5 Cr operating cash flow and Rs 217.7 Cr net sales.
Despite quarterly net sales decline, it showed resilience, outperforming the Sensex long-term.

news.title:
Premier Explosives sees strong order visibility from Defence, Mining, and Space sectors.
New greenfield plant by FY27; aims to double revenue in 3 years via exports and indigenisation.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives sees strong order visibility from Defence, Mining, and Space sectors.
New greenfield plant by FY27; aims to double revenue in 3 years via exports and indigenisation.

news.title:
Premier Explosives shifts rating agency from ICRA to India Ratings.
ICRA withdrew ratings for the firm's bank loans as per its policy.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives shifts rating agency from ICRA to India Ratings.
ICRA withdrew ratings for the firm's bank loans as per its policy.

news.title:
Premier Explosives Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 FY25, showcasing consolidated revenue of Rs. 24,668 lakhs.
Profit before tax after exceptional items stood at Rs. 4,352.36 lakhs; comprehensive income was Rs. 3,269.78 lakhs.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 FY25, showcasing consolidated revenue of Rs. 24,668 lakhs.
Profit before tax after exceptional items stood at Rs. 4,352.36 lakhs; comprehensive income was Rs. 3,269.78 lakhs.

news.title:
Premier Explosives Ltd secures Rs.16.4 crore export order for commercial explosives.
Order to be executed within 12 months; no related party transactions involved.
news.summary:
Premier Explosives Ltd secures Rs.16.4 crore export order for commercial explosives.
Order to be executed within 12 months; no related party transactions involved.
